nat_ips.description: Self-links of NAT IPs to be used in a Nat service. Only valid if the referenced RouterNat natIpAllocateOption is set to MANUAL_ONLY.

router.description: The name of the Cloud Router in which the referenced NAT service is configured.

router_nat.description: The name of the Nat service in which this address will be configured.

drain_nat_ips.description: A list of URLs of the IP resources to be drained. These IPs must be valid static external IPs that have been assigned to the NAT.

region.description: Region where the NAT service reside.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
